name: Adam M. Aron
role: CEO, President, and Director of AMC Entertainment
bio: Adam Aron is a veteran business executive who has served as the CEO and President of AMC Entertainment since 2016.
_evidence: Aron actively embraced the retail investor base during the 2021 squeeze, leveraging the momentum to raise capital and stabilize the company's balance sheet.

name: Sean D. Goodman
role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of AMC Entertainment
bio: Sean Goodman serves as the CFO of AMC, overseeing the company's financial strategy and capital structure.
_evidence: As CFO, he was responsible for managing the financial implications of the volatility and executing the capital raises that capitalized on the retail-driven price surge.

name: Elizabeth Furst Frank
role: Executive Vice President, Worldwide Programming & Chief Content Officer
bio: Elizabeth Frank is a long-standing executive at AMC, responsible for global programming and content strategy.
_evidence: While focused on operations and content, her leadership role during the 2021 period was central to maintaining the company's core business viability amidst the market chaos.
